[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11100111 6
1 10111001 5
2 00000000 a
3 00100000 1
4 11101111 7
5 11111011 7
6 11101000 4
7 10110011 5

01 10 00100000 1 match 3
12 21 11101011 6
23 32 11101000 4 match 6
34 43 10100000 2
45 54 10100011 4
56 65 10100111 5
67 76 10100001 3
70 07 00100000 1 match 3

02 20 00100000 1 match 3
13 31 11101000 4 match 6
24 42 10110011 5 match 7
35 53 10100000 2

60 06 00100000 1 match 3
71 17 10101001 4

36 63 11100000 3
47 74 10110001 4
50 05 00100000 1 match 3
61 16 11100111 6 match 0
72 27 10111001 5 match 1

15 51 10100111 5

37 73 10101000 3
